title: Retail Sales Specialist
summary: Consultative retail sales role focused on helping customers choose fitness equipment and accessories.

must_have.text: 2 years consultative or solution-based retail sales experience
Experience meeting commission or target-driven sales goals
Ability to guide customers through product selection and recommend the right fitness products
Comfort handling sales transactions, returns, exchanges, and basic retail operations
Maintain showroom cleanliness, merchandising displays, and store presentation
Weekend availability for in-person retail schedule

nice_to_have.text: Experience with Shopify, HubSpot, CRM systems, or Google Workspace
Fitness equipment or fitness industry knowledge
Handle customer email and phone inquiries and post-sale follow-up
Coordinate promotions, events, and teamwork across departments

responsibilities: Help customers choose the right fitness products and accessories.
Handle showroom transactions, returns, exchanges, and store presentation.
Answer customer inquiries by phone and email and assist with post-sale follow-up.
